user.title: PurpleAir Local
user.description: Enter the LAN address of your PurpleAir sensor (the IP it has on your home network — e.g. 192.168.1.42). The integration will read its data directly without going through the PurpleAir cloud.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the sensor at that address. Check the IP and that the sensor is powered on and connected to the same network.
error.invalid_response: The sensor responded but the data wasn't recognizable as a PurpleAir reading. Double-check the address — another device may be answering on that IP.

abort.already_configured: This sensor is already configured. Its host has been updated to the new address.

init.title: PurpleAir Local options
init.description: Change the sensor's IP (the unique sensor ID will be re-verified), polling cadence, which AQI corrections to expose as entities, or the channel-disagreement thresholds.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the sensor at the new address.
error.invalid_response: The new address responded but the data wasn't recognizable.
error.sensor_mismatch: The device at the new address has a different sensor ID — it's a different physical PurpleAir. Refusing to rebind to it. If you really want to use that device, remove this integration entry and add it as a new one.
